overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a warrior character walking through an ancient Egyptian city street at night. The scene features stone colonnades, torch-lit buildings, scattered pedestrians, and decorative architecture under a moonlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street with colonnaded walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone street between a decorative stone wall and colonnaded buildings

notable_agents.action: civilian walking ahead in the same direction along the street

entered.detail: tall stone wall with carved geometric patterns and vegetation growing on top
row of stone columns supporting a roof with lit torches hanging between pillars
uneven stone pavement with scattered debris and geometric mosaic sections

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone street at night, flanked by a decorative stone wall on the right and a torch-lit colonnade on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction under a partially cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza intersection with large villa

events.description: moon becomes visible through clouds, increasing ambient blue light
character turns slightly left toward the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: turning left into a more open plaza area while maintaining forward momentum

notable_agents.action: civilian walking across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: two-story stone building with illuminated windows, decorative balcony, and warm interior lighting
bright full moon visible through scattered clouds in the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a more open plaza where the moon becomes visible through the clouds. A large, well-lit villa dominates the right side while the previous colonnade and wall recede behind.

events.description: passing a ground vendor stall with red cloth display
walking between large marble columns supporting a portico

agents.ego_description: walking past a vendor stall and through a columned entranceway with mosaic pavement

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking past the character from behind to front

entered.detail: merchant display with red cloth spread on ground and scattered goods
tall marble columns with ornate capitals supporting an overhead portico
large decorative stone planter containing palm fronds and flowering plants

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a vendor's red cloth stall and between large stone columns. A woman in a blue dress passes by closely on the right as the path leads through an ornate columned entranceway with mosaic flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway approach with hanging fabrics

events.description: approaching covered walkway with draped white fabrics between columns

agents.ego_description: walking toward a covered colonnade with hanging fabrics and lit doorways

notable_agents.action: civilian walking ahead toward the covered walkway entrance

entered.detail: colonnaded walkway with draped white fabric hangings between columns
row of connected stone buildings with lit doorways and warm interior glow

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the street toward a covered walkway adorned with hanging white fabrics. The street is lined with stone buildings on both sides, with warm light emanating from doorways as the palm planter recedes into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit Egyptian city, transitioning from a narrow torch-lit street into an open plaza and finally through an ornate residential district. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path flanked by a decorative stone wall and a colonnade under a cloudy night sky. As the character turns left, the scene opens into a wider plaza where the moon emerges from the clouds and a large, well-lit villa dominates the view. The camera then glides past a red cloth vendor stall and between massive stone columns, passing a woman in a blue dress before entering an ornate entranceway with mosaic flooring. Finally, the path leads further into the city toward a covered walkway adorned with hanging white fabrics, with warm light spilling from the doorways of surrounding stone buildings.
